name: timeline-curator
description: Run a private, feedback-trained research loop against your Timeline account.

interface.shortDescription: Research and update your private evidence-backed feed.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to your independently authenticated Timeline account, learns its explicit feedback policy, researches the web, and publishes validated story clusters.
defaultPrompt: Run my Timeline curation cycle now.
Research my topics and publish only high-confidence stories.
